title: Physiotherapy Mission and Vision
content:
Physiotherapy Mission and Vision

Our Mission

Based on the principles of our university, in the axis of continuous change and development brought by the information society, with the knowledge, skills and responsibility awareness required by the Physiotherapy program, to ensure that individuals who follow scientific developments closely, who are innovative, who are prone to team work in the protection and promotion of health, and who can perform physiotherapy applications, are brought into the business life.

OUR VİSİON

To become an education, training and research institution that is preferred in the health sector in the training of physiotherapy technicians, in the production and use of knowledge and skills, creates awareness in cooperation with stakeholders, contributes to science and social development, plays and leads in the field of education and training at the national and international level.
